content.question: What is the precise causal contribution of the 6- and 8-year gimnázium tracks specifically (versus other school-choice and residential-sorting mechanisms) to measured inequality in educational access and attainment in Hungary?
content.reduction_path: Conduct regression discontinuity or instrumental-variable analysis exploiting variation in nearby school opening dates or catchment-area policy changes; compare Hungarian inequality trends before and after any past expansion or contraction of early-track enrollment.
